advisory.title: Buffer overflow in chrono before 0.4.19
advisory.description: A vulnerability exists in chrono where parsing of certain inputs could cause a buffer overflow, allowing remote attackers to cause a denial of service.

advisory.title: Cryptographic failure in sodiumoxide before 0.2.6
advisory.description: The sodiumoxide crate before version 0.2.6 contains a cryptographic issue that allows attackers to bypass security measures.

advisory.title: SQL injection in rusqlite before 0.25
advisory.description: Improper input validation in rusqlite before 0.25 could allow SQL injection attacks.
